evals.prompt:
Can you review my resume? Here it is:

John Doe
Software Engineer | john.doe@gmail.com | 555-123-4567 | New York, NY

SUMMARY
I am a passionate software developer with 5 years of experience who loves building great products and is a team player. I have excellent communication skills and I'm always eager to learn new technologies.

SKILLS
Expert in Java, C++, Python, Machine Learning, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, FastAPI, Django, SQL, Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, React, Angular, Vue.js, MongoDB, Redis, GraphQL, REST APIs

WORK EXPERIENCE
Software Developer - ABC Corp (Jan 2020 - Present)
• Worked on the backend code
• Helped with database optimization
• Created new features for the application
• Did code reviews and mentored junior developers

Junior Developer - XYZ Inc (Jun 2018 - Dec 2019)
• Developed various web applications
• Participated in agile ceremonies
• Responsible for testing

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
University of State, 2018
GPA: 3.2/4.0
evals.expected_output: Should identify multiple critical issues: generic summary in first person, too many unrelated skills, weak bullet points lacking how/why, no quantified achievements, vague language throughout

evals.prompt: How should I write bullet points for my work experience section? I'm a backend developer applying for senior roles.
evals.expected_output: Should explain the how-and-why test, use strong action verbs, quantify achievements, write in past tense/third person, and provide concrete examples relevant to backend development

evals.prompt:
I'm applying for a Python backend developer position at a fintech company. Here's my resume:

Jane Smith
Python Backend Developer | jane.smith@proton.me | +1-555-987-6543 | San Francisco, CA | linkedin.com/in/janesmith | github.com/janesmith

SUMMARY
A self-driven backend developer with 4 years of fintech experience, specializing in building high-throughput payment processing systems. Contributed to 3 open-source Python libraries and proactively collaborated with compliance teams to ensure regulatory adherence.

SKILLS
Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Redis, AWS (SQS, Lambda), Celery

EXPERIENCE
Senior Backend Developer - FinPay Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 03/2022 - Present
• Architected a real-time payment reconciliation system using PostgreSQL and Redis, reducing settlement discrepancies by 35%
• Designed and implemented a webhook delivery service with retry logic and exponential backoff, achieving 99.9% delivery rate for 2M+ daily events
• Optimized database query performance through indexing and materialized views, reducing p95 API response time from 800ms to 120ms
• Led migration from monolithic Django app to FastAPI microservices, improving deployment frequency from weekly to daily

Backend Developer - LoanTech Solutions | Oakland, CA | 06/2020 - 02/2022
• Built an automated loan application scoring pipeline using Python and PostgreSQL, processing 10K+ applications daily
• Implemented audit logging system compliant with SOC 2 requirements, capturing all data mutations with timestamps
• Reduced infrastructure costs by 25% by optimizing AWS Lambda cold starts and consolidating redundant services

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Stanford University, Stanford, CA
Graduated: 05/2020 | GPA: 3.7/4.0
Dean's List, Relevant Coursework: Distributed Systems, Database Systems, Algorithms
evals.expected_output: Should provide a positive review with high score, noting strong bullet points with quantified achievements, well-tailored skills, specific and unique summary, good ATS formatting. May suggest minor refinements only.
